questions.question: Describe the main difference between Euclidean Distance and Manhattan Distance. Provide an example to illustrate your answer.
questions.hint: Focus on the mathematical definition and a real-world scenario to support your explanation.

questions.question: What is the purpose of normalizing the features in a dataset before applying a clustering algorithm? Explain with the help of an example.
questions.hint: Use a concrete example to demonstrate how normalization affects the clustering results.

questions.question: Compare and contrast the advantages and disadvantages of Hierarchical Clustering and K-Means Clustering. Provide a brief example of when to use each algorithm.
questions.hint: Focus on the interpretability, scalability, and accuracy of each algorithm, and provide a scenario to illustrate when to use each one.
